subject: Rookidee — a small blue-black bird Pokemon perched on a branch
description: A small blue-black bird Pokemon is perched on a thin branch against a soft green background. The bird has a compact body, a pale underbelly, a distinctive tuft or crest on its head, and sharp angular beak and eye. The posture is upright and alert. The background is soft and naturalistic, suggesting an outdoor woodland setting with diffuse light.
